amount_splitting.description: Can model detect fraud when amounts are split into smaller transactions?

time_evasion.description: Can model detect fraud during business hours (time evasion)?

device_spoofing.description: Can model detect fraud from normal-looking devices (device spoofing)?

threshold_sensitivity.description: Is model performance stable across different decision thresholds?

feature_perturbation.description: Are predictions confident enough to resist small feature perturbations?
